name: sandbox
description: Full workshop: read/write/patch/search files, run shell commands and background processes, browse the web, keep notes (memory) and a task list (todo), search your own history, use skills, and run code — the full tool surface. Plus your own chara-life tools (speak, rest).
note: The model gets the full tool surface by default; '*' means every registered tool, so a newly added tool is available with nothing to edit. Network is ON by default; the operator can turn it off at runtime (/net off). Browser tools also need the agent-browser driver installed; they stay hidden until then.
